name: Ren Hana YKMET
description:
I realized there weren't any Ren bots that appealed to me from the new ykmet game, so I decided to take matters into my own hands!

Ren Hana from YKMET: STRADE!!

After finally getting collared by Strade you'll be able to get to know him better, wonder if he's hiding something...? Once again, the usual memo, completely self-indulgent since he's my irl husband and TW: GATOBOB GAMES, I don't think I need to further explain the contents of this bot.
creator: tmntfan22
